tasks.name: Daily Website Audit
tasks.description: Checks conversion tracking, landing pages, font loading, PageSpeed, and commits any fixes. Runs daily via scheduled Claude Code.

tasks.name: Weekly Content Planner
tasks.description: Plans blog content queue, social posts, and content calendar. Checks 7-day threshold, surfaces top keyword gaps, queues social posts via Publer. Runs Fridays.

tasks.name: Google Ads Optimizer
tasks.description: Pulls optimization score, checks negative keywords, ad copy, bid adjustments, and conversion tracking health. Runs Mondays.

tasks.name: SEO Performance Check
tasks.description: Runs PageSpeed Insights on key landing pages, checks keyword ranking shifts, audits schema markup, reviews Google Search Console signals. Runs Mondays.

tasks.name: LoanOS Enterprise Build
tasks.description: Master Orchestrator + 6-subagent pipeline: research → architect → builder → reviewer → QA → reporter. Runs AM and PM. Builds Phase 3 enterprise features.

tasks.name: Social Media Content Build
tasks.description: 6-subagent pipeline (NotebookLM → Refresh → Research → Architect → Builder → Quality → Reviewer → QA → Reporter). Runs AM daily. Builds EVERGREEN + TIMELY post copy for LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook. Compliance-checked before Publer scheduling.

tasks.name: Schema Hardening
tasks.description: Multi-tenancy enforcement — NOT NULL constraints, RLS policy audit, null row backfill across all org-scoped tables.

tasks.name: Arive/LoanOS Separation
tasks.description: Clean separation of concerns — Arive owns loan processing, LoanOS owns CRM/marketing/communications. Includes dead code removal and n8n workflow cleanup.
